permissions.name: organizations.viewAny.tenant
permissions.description: List Organizations for the current tenant. Any tenant member can see the org list.

permissions.name: organizations.create.tenant
permissions.description: Create a new Organization. Consumes organization_slot. Refused at cap.

permissions.name: organizations.delete.tenant
permissions.description: Soft-delete + archive. Refused on is_default / has descendants / referenced by branches.

permissions.name: organizations.reparent.tenant
permissions.description: Move an Organization under a new parent. Requires organization_reparent entitlement. Every reparent is audit-critical.

permissions.name: organizations.set_default.tenant
permissions.description: Flip is_default=true. Audit-critical (shifts every downstream default-org filter).

permissions.name: organizations.branding.update.tenant
permissions.description: Write logo_url + primary_color + secondary_color + description. Requires organization_branding entitlement.

permissions.name: organizations.tree.view.tenant
permissions.description: Read the tenant tree (org hierarchy). Same audience as viewAny.
